name: Masa Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 3/8 cups warm water, very warm, depends on humidity and other factors
recipeInstructions:
This pairings particularly well with chili. For variation, consider adding 1 or 2 teaspoons of cumin and/or chili powder.
Note: masa harina can be found in the flour section of many grocery stores, including Latin-American grocery stores.
